sigWerErrors.reason: 'quinientos' (five hundred) is a completely different number from 'cincuenta y cinco' (fifty-five), which changes the meaning of the number being stated.
Omitting 'cinco' (five) changes the number from 'fifty-five two' to 'fifty-two', which significantly alters the intended number.
